name: Lemony Asparagus and New Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Olive Oil, or Any Cooking Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Snap off and discard the woody bases from fresh asparagus. If desired, scrape off any remaining scales. Cut into 2-inch pieces. Set aside.
2. Cook potatoes, covered, in a small amount of boiling water in a 2-quart saucepan for 10 minutes. Add asparagus. Cook, covered, about 8 more minutes or until asparagus is crisp-tender and potatoes are tender. Drain.
3. Transfer vegetables to a serving bowl.
4. For dressing, combine the oil, lemon zest, salt, and thyme. Add to the vegetables; toss gently to coat. If desired, garnish with a lemon peel curl and fresh thyme. Serve warm.
Food Exchanges:
1/2 vegetable, 1 bread, 1/2 fat
